content: For interactive route display in Next.js: Use @react-google-maps/api or @vis.gl/react-google-maps. Map components must be 'use client' (no SSR). For multi-day routes: DirectionsService calculates route polylines; DirectionsRenderer displays them. To show each day in a different color use separate DirectionsRenderer instances with polylineOptions.strokeColor. Security: NEVER expose API key as NEXT_PUBLIC_; instead, proxy all Places/Routes API calls through Next.js Route Handlers (App Router) or API Routes (Pages Router) where key is stored in env.local. Client-side map uses Maps JavaScript API with a separate restricted key.
